execute.sql:
CREATE TABLE "public"."user" (
  "address" jsonb,
  "createdAt" timestamptz DEFAULT (now()) NOT NULL,
  "displayName" text NOT NULL,
  "email" text NOT NULL,
  "id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  "kind" text NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid
  WHERE c.conname = 'user_kind_check'
  AND n.nspname = 'public'
  AND c.conrelid = to_regclass('"public"."user"')
)

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."user" ADD CONSTRAINT "user_kind_check" CHECK ("kind" IN ('admin', 'user'))

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid
  WHERE c.conname = 'user_kind_check'
  AND n.nspname = 'public'
  AND c.conrelid = to_regclass('"public"."user"')
)

execute.sql:
CREATE TABLE "public"."post" (
  "createdAt" timestamptz DEFAULT (now()) NOT NULL,
  "embedding" vector(1536),
  "id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  "priority" text DEFAULT 'low' NOT NULL,
  "title" text NOT NULL,
  "userId" text NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid
  WHERE c.conname = 'post_priority_check'
  AND n.nspname = 'public'
  AND c.conrelid = to_regclass('"public"."post"')
)

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."post" ADD CONSTRAINT "post_priority_check" CHECK ("priority" IN ('low', 'high', 'urgent'))

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid
  WHERE c.conname = 'post_priority_check'
  AND n.nspname = 'public'
  AND c.conrelid = to_regclass('"public"."post"')
)

execute.sql:
CREATE TABLE "public"."task" (
  "createdAt" timestamptz DEFAULT (now()) NOT NULL,
  "description" text,
  "id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  "status" text DEFAULT 'open' NOT NULL,
  "title" text NOT NULL,
  "type" text NOT NULL,
  "userId" text NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public"."bug" (
  "id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  "severity" text NOT NULL,
  "stepsToRepro" text,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public"."feature" (
  "id" character(36) NOT NULL,
  "priority" text NOT NULL,
  "targetRelease" text,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint c
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.connamespace = n.oid
  WHERE c.conname = 'post_userId_fkey'
  AND n.nspname = 'public'
  AND c.conrelid = to_regclass('"public"."post"')
)

execute.sql:

ADD CONSTRAINT "post_userId_fkey"
FOREIGN KEY ("userId")
